name: claudesonnet111
description: AI consulting outreach to Westchester/Tri-state SMBs. Sources axon-graded leads with per-lead ai_leverage_summary as the personalized opener. Auto-sends. Best leads (highest grade) ship first each day.

identity.signature:
— Steven
Smore Labs · Westchester County, NY
identity.persona_voice: Direct, founder-to-owner. Lead with a specific operational gap the recipient has. No marketing fluff.

source.comment: Axon heuristic grader output. Provides grade_letter, grade_score, ai_leverage_summary, pitch_options, gaps, geo_tier, fetch_status.

subjects: Where does AI fit into your business model?
Saw {name}'s site — one AI tool that would pay for itself
pitch_pack.demo_block_when_present: I built a quick proof of concept for {name} — take a look: {demo_url}

personalization.fallback_opener: Most {trade} shops in {town} are losing after-hours leads to voicemail and one-off Wix sites. There's a one-time, AI-leveraged fix for each of those.

default: https://supreme-seams.com (built for a Pleasantville auto-upholstery shop)

opt_out.footer: Reply STOP to be removed from this list.

state.comment: SHARED with legacy send_emails.py + axon auto_sender. Same file = one pacing envelope, no double-sends across the three senders.
